name: slack
description: Bring Slack into your AI tools with a Slack MCP server and Slack skills

interface.shortDescription: Slack MCP server and skills for your AI tools
interface.longDescription: Connect your AI tools to Slack through the Slack MCP server to search messages, files, and channels, send and schedule messages, read threads, and manage canvases. Includes skills for building Slack apps with the Slack CLI and Bolt, calling Web API methods, and composing Block Kit layouts.
